verses.1: LORD, our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth!
verses.2: From the lips of babes and infants you have established strength,
verses.3: When I consider your heavens, the work of your fingers,
verses.4: what is man, that you think of him?
verses.5: For you have made him a little lower than the angels,
verses.6: You make him ruler over the works of your hands.
verses.8: the birds of the sky, the fish of the sea,
